hero.title: About Yanghua Cable - Flexible Copper Busbar Manufacturer
hero.subtitle: Leading the future of electrical power distribution system technology with innovation, quality, and reliability since 2013.

overview.title: Leading High Current Busbar Solution Excellence
overview.description: With over a decade of experience, we are committed to delivering high-quality custom busbar design solutions that meet the most demanding industry standards. Our state-of-the-art facilities and expert team ensure reliable industrial busbar applications for every project.

mission.title: Mission & Values
mission.subtitle: Driving innovation and excellence in cable manufacturing
mission.missionContent: To provide innovative, reliable, and sustainable cable solutions that power the world's most critical infrastructure and enable technological advancement.
mission.missionDescription: We are committed to excellence in every aspect of our business, from research and development to manufacturing and customer service.

values.innovation: Innovation - Continuously pushing the boundaries of cable technology
values.responsibility: Responsibility - Committed to environmental sustainability and social responsibility
values.cooperation: Cooperation - Building strong partnerships with customers and suppliers
values.sustainability: Sustainability - Developing eco-friendly solutions for a better future

journey.title: Our Journey
journey.subtitle: From a small startup to an industry leader, our journey reflects our commitment to excellence and innovation.

timeline.title: Our Development Journey
timeline.subtitle: Key milestones in our growth and innovation

milestones.event: Company founded with a vision to revolutionize cable manufacturing
Achieved ISO 9001 certification and expanded production capacity
Launched innovative fire-resistant cable series for critical applications
Established international partnerships and entered global markets
Reached 1 million meters of cable production milestone

certifications.title: Quality & Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Our commitment to quality is validated by international certifications and rigorous testing standards.
certifications.description: All our products undergo rigorous testing and quality control processes to ensure they meet or exceed international standards for safety, performance, and reliability.

team.title: Our Leadership Team
team.subtitle: Meet the experienced professionals driving our company's vision and growth.

experience.ceo: 15+ years in electrical engineering and business leadership
experience.cto: 20+ years in cable technology research and development
experience.engineer: 12+ years in product design and manufacturing optimization
experience.qa: 18+ years in quality management and international standards

cta.subtitle: Let's discuss how our innovative cable solutions can meet your specific requirements and help you achieve your project goals.
cta.description: Let's discuss how our innovative cable solutions can meet your specific requirements and drive your project's success.

equipment.title: Testing Equipment
equipment.subtitle: Our state-of-the-art testing equipment ensures the highest quality and reliability of our products
